component.name: Stack
component.description: Vertical flex container. Stacks children top-to-bottom with consistent spacing from the space.stack token scale. The primary building block for content hierarchy within a page section.

when: Arranging content vertically with consistent spacing between items
Building a form, card body, or sidebar section where elements flow top-to-bottom
Composing a heading + body text + action group in a single vertical flow

patterns.name: form-field-group
patterns.description: Vertical list of form fields with consistent spacing.

patterns.name: content-block
patterns.description: Heading followed by body text and a CTA action.

patterns.name: card-body
patterns.description: Card inner content arranged as a vertical stack.

antiPatterns.reason: Stack is always column direction. Horizontal spacing belongs to Inline.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Inline for side-by-side arrangement of items

antiPatterns.scenario: Nesting Stack inside Stack with the same gap just to group items
antiPatterns.reason: Redundant nesting with identical gaps is visual noise with no structural benefit
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a single Stack and rely on Box with padding to create visual grouping if needed

purpose.default: Column flex container with configurable gap, alignment, and justification.

states.description: Static layout container — no interactive states.
